{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032017180402CE37395F44F70458FC"}"},"total":1145},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7320275903798838026","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好看，慢热不突兀，感情戏很好，真的得让那些写小白文的来看看，他们的那些感情戏不尴尬吗，像三九写的七夜和迦蓝，看的我鸡皮疙瘩都起来了[捂脸][捂脸][捂脸][捂脸]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1704385842,"group_id":"7229358769329671168","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"无聊无聊无聊无聊无聊","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N2y2Q1oe96wM0QXB6t4CPWc=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/40fb79971bf24407bbf990bad9a584cf~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776531089&x-signature=lDpvcTW4rfb0970PlGN8%2BSZ4Ats%3D","user_id":"107748486493","user_name":"抑不了一点雨"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"107748486493","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7229358769329671168","book_info":{"abstract":"（作者玻璃心，山水有相逢。）
错位人生，男变女加女变男，非传统流派，前期不规则互换身体，后期彻底交换，假结婚变真结婚，情感发展。
男变女后的许安面对原身的哥哥和爱慕的对象，他将何去何从，女变男后的大小姐班昭悠又该如何适应落差？
有一个妹妹要养的许安上一刻还在出租屋里光着膀子吃泡面，一睁眼就到了豪华酒店的浴缸里，变成了肤白貌美细柳腰的大美人。
另一边的班昭悠也想问：发生甚么事了。
当各自的生活被打乱，在完全陌生的领域，匪夷所思的视角，体会完全不同的人生。
什么？还有未婚夫！不行一定要立刻变回去！！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o4a8bd5023ccd7f54225bbac3854892d4~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"留个盒子给我","author_id":"","book_id":"7229358769329671168","book_name":"我一男的和千金互换身体","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#182028","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3443人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":831,"name":"灵魂互换","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=831&name=灵魂互换&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7269017128668725820","read_count":"3443","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"614732"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.2","serial_count":"303","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,灵魂互换","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o4a8bd5023ccd7f54225bbac3854892d4~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779182284&x-signature=z5NM5gRkBnIFCzJguihtSBbW0ok%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"975979858368141","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"266"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032017180402CE37395F44F70458FC"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读8小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":9,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":2099,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":29651,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":2497},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1704386418,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7332213229107184409","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"写的真的好，以前只看过男主变身后和女的贴贴 ，磕磕糖，第一次如此认同男主最后变嫁的结局（当然是对象是女主），他们俩真的，那种心灵的契合，前后循序渐进的心理变化，挺感动的。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1707175146,"group_id":"7229358769329671168","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N8uiw2g+O/jpDK2P02/zVV59hr501Z7DBjv331eQDO9Z","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"2559262256270140","user_name":"爱吃焖黄羊肉的胡雪儿"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2559262256270140","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7229358769329671168","book_info":{"abstract":"（作者玻璃心，山水有相逢。）
错位人生，男变女加女变男，非传统流派，前期不规则互换身体，后期彻底交换，假结婚变真结婚，情感发展。
男变女后的许安面对原身的哥哥和爱慕的对象，他将何去何从，女变男后的大小姐班昭悠又该如何适应落差？
有一个妹妹要养的许安上一刻还在出租屋里光着膀子吃泡面，一睁眼就到了豪华酒店的浴缸里，变成了肤白貌美细柳腰的大美人。

什么？还有未婚夫！不行一定要立刻变回去！！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o4a8bd5023ccd7f54225bbac3854892d4~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"留个盒子给我","author_id":"","book_id":"7229358769329671168","book_name":"我一男的和千金互换身体","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#182028","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3443人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":831,"name":"灵魂互换","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=831&name=灵魂互换&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7269017128668725820","read_count":"3443","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"614732"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.2","serial_count":"303","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,灵魂互换","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o4a8bd5023ccd7f54225bbac3854892d4~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779182284&x-signature=z5NM5gRkBnIFCzJguihtSBbW0ok%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"975979858368141","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"273"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032017180402CE37395F44F70458FC"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读9小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":19,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":34021,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":8284},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1707183057,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7343548580676305689","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"作者的笔力不错，很多描述都是极为细腻的，印象最深的是糖划过牙齿犹如指头拂过琴键（大意），还有一些描述都是通过第三方视角，适读性很高，总体来说很清新的调调。但作品着实平淡，没有各种大起大落的事件对感情加以磨砺，接受命运的安排只是荡起了一丝漪涟，也许是冲突和矛盾设计的不够多，人物性格有些扁平化了。正如文章所描述的，许安的心理过于强大，基本不需要心理辅导，性别认知全靠自己，这个心理医生仿佛就是来卖萌的，没起到什么作用。而且这个桥段的设计有些不巧妙，如果用密匙来进行灵魂互换传递信息，兴许会更有意思，还能有一些量子纠缠的意味在其中。其实也能看出来作者是明显的文科生，还有关于地理，戏曲等知识在文中安排的不突兀，都是值得称赞的。
其实在互换前期，如果能设计出带有规律的方式，然后彼此通过这种特性解决相互的问题，可能会让作品的冲突点更多，也会把各自的性格特点展现的立体一些，有了这种并肩作战的经历，后续感情的升华或许更加顺理成章。
总而言之，作者很用心，换魂文中也算小清新，希望未来会越写越好！","text_exts":[{"e":235,"s":231,"text":"灵魂互换","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E7%81%B5%E9%AD%82%E4%BA%92%E6%8D%A2&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231773998284F70458FC%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227343548580676305689%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227229358769329671168%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E7%81%B5%E9%AD%82%E4%BA%92%E6%8D%A2%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1709805719,"group_id":"7229358769329671168","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NzFDmp1YtXj6l7Mai5Z8ct3qofbcpjQ35Xowc9Z4s6vU","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/8b91e01a7b0242389b43128fe854e4b7~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"2676629117868798","user_name":"喜欢兰香草的玉清子"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2676629117868798","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1770965737,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"活动专属","bg_color":"#E5FAF9","can_worn":false,"id":33,"name":"巅峰品鉴官","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/66e862e57c3d2bb30fe45e7b14498a89","sticker_type":2,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/66e862e57c3d2bb30fe45e7b14498a89"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7229358769329671168","book_info":{"abstract":"（作者玻璃心，山水有相逢。）
